user.title: Configure Tools for Assist
user.description: Select the services you want to enable for Tools for Assist.

brave.title: Configure Brave Web Search
brave.description: Configure Brave Web Search API settings.

brave_llm.title: Configure Brave LLM Context Search
brave_llm.description: Configure Brave LLM Context API settings.

searxng.title: Configure SearXNG Web Search
searxng.description: Configure SearXNG Web Search API settings.

data_description.searxng_server_url: Protocol, host, and port, eg: http://localhost:8080

google_api_key.title: Configure Google API Key
google_api_key.description: Enter your Google API key. This key is shared by Google Places and Google Routes.

data_description.google_routes_home_address: Starting point for route calculations (e.g. '123 Main St, Springfield, IL')
data_description.google_routes_default_travel_mode: Travel mode used when the assistant doesn't specify one

data_description.weather_daily_entity: Weather entity to pull daily forecast data from
data_description.weather_hourly_entity: Optional weather entity to include hourly forecast data from
data_description.current_temperature_entity: Optional temperature sensor to include "current" temperature from

basic_utilities.title: Configure Basic Utilities
basic_utilities.description: Select which basic utility tools to enable.

home_control.title: Configure Home Control API
home_control.description: Take control of Home Assistants inbuilt **Assist** platform by customising the hidden prompt and disabling any unwanted tools. You must disable the **Assist** tools from your Conversation Agents when utilising this.

data_description.home_control_prompt: Override the hidden tooling prompt that is injected by the Assist API. This can be useful if this contains conflicts with your Conversation Agents prompt
data_description.home_control_disabled_tools: Disable any of the standard Assist platform tools that you do not wish your model to have access to.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one instance of Tools for Assist is allowed

init.title: Tools for Assist Options
init.description: Choose what you want to do:

configure.title: Configure Search Services
configure.description: Select which services to you would like to use.

test_youtube_music.title: Test YouTube Music
test_youtube_music.description:
Searches YouTube and plays the first result on the selected media player.

**Result:** {result}

data_description.query: Enter a song, artist, album, or other YouTube search
data_description.entity_id: The device that will play the audio

configure_weather.title: Configure Weather Forecast
configure_weather.description: Select which services to you would like to use.

brave.title: Configure Brave Web Search
brave.description: Configure Brave Web Search API settings.

brave_llm.title: Configure Brave LLM Context Search
brave_llm.description: Configure Brave LLM Context API settings.

searxng.title: Configure SearXNG Web Search
searxng.description: Configure SearXNG Web Search API settings.

data_description.searxng_server_url: Protocol, host, and port, eg: http://localhost:8080

google_api_key.title: Configure Google API Key
google_api_key.description: Enter your Google API key. This key is shared by Google Places and Google Routes.

data_description.google_routes_home_address: Starting point for route calculations (e.g. '123 Main St, Springfield, IL')
data_description.google_routes_default_travel_mode: Travel mode used when the assistant doesn't specify one

data_description.weather_daily_entity: Weather entity to pull daily forecast data from
data_description.weather_hourly_entity: Optional weather entity to include hourly forecast data from
data_description.current_temperature_entity: Optional temperature sensor to include "current" temperature from

configure_basic_utilities.title: Configure Basic Utilities
configure_basic_utilities.description: Enable or disable Basic Utilities tools.

basic_utilities.title: Configure Basic Utilities
basic_utilities.description: Select which basic utility tools to enable.

home_control.title: Configure Home Control API
home_control.description: Take control of Home Assistants inbuilt **Assist** platform by customising the hidden prompt and disabling any unwanted tools. You must disable the **Assist** tools from your Conversation Agents when utilising this.

data_description.home_control_prompt: Override the hidden tooling prompt that is injected by the Assist API. This can be useful if this contains conflicts with your Conversation Agents prompt
data_description.home_control_disabled_tools: Disable any of the standard Assist platform tools that you do not wish your model to have access to.
